output: Our business hours are Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST. We are closed on weekends and major holidays.

instruction: How do I reset my password?
output: To reset your password: 1) Go to the login page, 2) Click 'Forgot Password', 3) Enter your email address, 4) Check your inbox for the reset link, 5) Create a new password with at least 8 characters.

We offer a 30-day return policy for all unused items in their original packaging. To initiate a return, contact our support team with your order number. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.

instruction: How do I track my order?
output: You can track your order by visiting our website and entering your order number #12345 in the tracking section. You'll also receive email updates at each shipping milestone.
Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping typically takes 7-14 business days. Shipping costs vary by destination and are calculated at checkout.

instruction: How can I contact customer support?
output: You can reach our customer support team through: Email at support@example.com, Live chat on our website (available 24/7), or Phone at 1-800-555-0123 during business hours.

instruction: What payment methods do you accept?
output: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and Apple Pay. All transactions are secured with SSL encryption.

instruction: How do I cancel my subscription?
output: To cancel your subscription: Go to Account Settings > Subscriptions > Click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. No refunds for partial months.

instruction: Is there a free trial available?
output: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to start. You can upgrade to a paid plan at any time during or after the trial.

instruction: How do I update my billing information?
output: To update your billing information: Navigate to Account Settings > Billing > Update Payment Method. Enter your new card details and click Save. Changes take effect immediately for future charges.

instruction: Summarize the main point of this feedback.
input: I've been using your product for 3 months now and I have to say the onboarding experience was rough. The documentation was sparse and I had to figure out most things on my own. However, once I got past the learning curve, the product itself is excellent. The API is well-designed and performance is great.
output: The customer had a difficult onboarding experience due to sparse documentation, but finds the core product excellent with a well-designed API and strong performance after the initial learning curve.

instruction: Write a professional response to this complaint.
input: Your software crashed and I lost 2 hours of work. This is unacceptable!
output: I sincerely apologize for the crash that caused you to lose your work. That is absolutely unacceptable, and I understand your frustration. Our engineering team is investigating this issue as a top priority. In the meantime, I'd like to offer you a one-month credit on your account. We're also implementing auto-save functionality to prevent data loss in the future. Could you share any error messages or your session ID so we can trace the exact cause?
